steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The blank requires a noun and a relative clause: “materials that Palma Rodriguez uses in his art.” The relative clause is dependent and introduced by “that.”

steps.title: Apply the rule about restrictive relative clauses
steps.content:
A relative clause introduced by “that” is restrictive and takes no commas because it's essential to identifying which noun is meant. Choices A and D incorrectly add a comma before “that,” and C incorrectly adds a comma after the clause.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
